roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S REQUEST TO ATC FOR MOTION TO PROCEED TO DEJ SENTENCING FILED
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION  PROCEED TO DEJ/VD: 10-30-20/VD: 12-18-20/X: DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF THE DEJ AND COURT IMPOSES SENTENCE OF 18 DAYS CJ/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TBH 19016860/BAIL: 100000/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-30-20/CONTD: MTR HEARING ON 12-18-20/

/CAL:ADDED TO CAL FOR CHANGE OF PLEA/OR/VD:MSC ON 11-14-19 AND JURY TRIALON 11-20-19 AND LAST DAY OF 11-27-19/X:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA & ENTERS A 8 MONTH DIVERSN/FNDG/GTW/X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT GET ANY NEW ARRESTS, NO CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE OR STAY AWAY ORDER VIOLATIONS, ORDERSFILED IN CASE 18014168, FOLLOW AND ABIDE BY ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION IN CASE 18014168, AND SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE CLASSES/X:IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL IN DEJ, HE MAY WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA AND MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED/X:IF DEFENDANT IS NOT SUCCESSFULL IN DEJ, HE WILL BE SENTENCED TO 18 DAYS IN CUSTODY WITH CREDIT FOR 18 DAYS, AND NO PROBATION,  HE WILL REMAIN IN PROBATION IN CASE 18014168/ARBUCKLE/SUPP:02-10-20/S50/CONTD:DEPT 50 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PROBATION IN CASE 18014168 FROM APDAND STATUS OF DEJ ON 02-10-20/CONTD:DEPT 50 FOR STATUS OF DEJ AND POSSIBLE SENTENCING ON 07-13-20/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/BAIL:15,000/NTW/LDTR:11-27-19/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/CONTD:MSC/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS AND STATUS OF M99 20010973/CONTD: POSSIBLE APD MTR FILING/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/SHER/BAIL:5000/CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS AND STATUS OF M99 20010973/DOP/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO APPEARANCE/X:BENCHWARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING/
/CAL:DV PROGRESS REPORT & DEJ STATUS/X:DEFENDANT MISSED ORIENTATION FOR PROGRAM/CTORD:REPORT TO PROBATION TODAY/CONT/DOPU:APD/
/CAL:DV PROGRESS REPORT & DEJ STATUS/X:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO PROBATIONFOR A REFERRAL TO A NEW DV PROGRAM/CONT/DOPU:APD/
/CAL:PTC/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:SENTENCED ON 11-12-19/
